subject: Plan ENSP protein edge remapping
description: Use protein node ensembl_gene_id/uniprot_id xrefs to decide and implement safe remapping for legacy protein-named edges from gene endpoints to ENSP endpoints where unambiguous.
result: Audited legacy protein-edge remapping coverage against ENSP protein nodes. Direct blind remapping is unsafe: most legacy endpoints are NCBI IDs, and many genes have multiple ENSP translations. Only 1,528 molecule_targets_protein endpoints were unambiguously single-ENSP. Updated CLAUDE.md: next safe edge is gene_encodes_protein from nodes/protein.parquet, not rewriting legacy protein-named edges.
